MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Davis Paul Management Group is present. Represented by Michelle Davis.
Attorney, Kevin Greenquist appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Eileen Mary Siskel is present and appearing with Limited Scope Attorney, Deok Keun Matthew Ahn.

The Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of September 17, 2012 is vacated.
